title: Count consecutive WS failures; disable ephemeral after 5
description: In client_task.rs main loop: add ws_consecutive_failures: usize counter (const WS_MAX_FAILURES: usize = 5). Reset to 0 on TypingIndicator or PresenceUpdate. Increment on StreamEnded. When >= WS_MAX_FAILURES, emit AppEvent::EphemeralUnavailable, add tracing::warn!, and skip ws_needs_restart. On AuthFailed, also send EphemeralUnavailable (already permanent). Depends on cu3j.1.
close_reason: ws_consecutive_failures counter; EphemeralUnavailable after 5 consecutive StreamEnded; AuthFailed also clears flag
